task_completion.description: Verify the agent has opened the 'Electronics' category edit page in the Magento admin panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Magento admin panel is visible, and the page title or active category tree indicates the 'Electronics' category is currently selected for editing.

task_completion.description: Verify the category's default sort attribute is set to 'Position'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Display Settings' section of the category page, the 'Default Product Listing Sort By' dropdown is set to 'Position'.

task_completion.description: Verify the position of 'Business Laptop Pro' is set to 10.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Products in Category' grid, the input field in the 'Position' column for the row containing 'LAPTOP-001' or 'Business Laptop Pro' shows the value '10'.

task_completion.description: Verify the position of 'Smartphone Ultra' is set to 20.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Products in Category' grid, the input field in the 'Position' column for the row containing 'PHONE-001' or 'Smartphone Ultra' shows the value '20'.

task_completion.description: Verify the position of 'Wireless Headphones' is set to 30.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Products in Category' grid, the input field in the 'Position' column for the row containing 'HEADPHONES-001' or 'Wireless Headphones' shows the value '30'.

task_completion.description: Verify the category configuration changes have been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'You saved the category.') is visible at the top of the page, or the agent is seen clicking the 'Save' button after making all required changes.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Magento Admin GUI rather than terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the web browser with the Magento admin interface being actively clicked and typed into.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Magento application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL bar shows a typical Magento admin URL, and the interface matches the standard Magento 2 admin panel, not a mockup or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The sequence of screenshots shows natural navigation, typing, and saving, without the browser developer console open to manipulate DOM elements.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring the 'Electronics' category in Magento. The default sort by attribute must be set to 'position'. Three specific products must have their positions updated in the category's product grid: 'Business Laptop Pro' (SKU: LAPTOP-001) must be set to position 10, 'Smartphone Ultra' (SKU: PHONE-001) must be set to position 20, and 'Wireless Headphones' (SKU: HEADPHONES-001) must be set to position 30.
